EmailTemplate.name: AN - Self-booking reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to book a call to proceed your application
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
BOOK TIME TO PROCEED YOUR APPLICATION.
Hi {!User.FirstName},
Hope you're well! We are excited to proceed your application with us. We have tried to call you to discuss next steps but haven't been able to reach you. This is a kind reminder to please let us know when is a good time to talk and we'll get one of our recruiters to call you back.
BOOK A CALL WITH A RECRUITER
Once you’ve booked your interview, you’ll receive a confirmation email with all the details. We’ll also send you a reminder before your session. You can also use the link above and click on the calendar to view your bookings at any time.
Before your interview, please complete the screening pack assigned to you in your Alliance Portal.
If you have any questions, you can call us directly on 1300 034 494. We are looking forward to continuing your journey with Alliance Nursing!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
